name: [TEMPLATE] [technical_audit_plugin] Technical Site Audit — DataForSEO on-page + PageSpeed → ranked findings → notify

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: DataForSEO On-Page

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ url: $json.__target, enable_javascript: true, load_resources: true, enable_browser_rendering: false }]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Spend Increment

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_window_start: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), p_channel: "dataforseo", p_sender_id: "dataforseo-daily", p_count: 1, p_spend_usd: (Number($json.__spend_delta) || 0) }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: PageSpeed
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Findings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__issues || []).map((f) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, url: f.url || $json.__target, finding_id: f.finding_id, issue_class: f.issue_class, severity: f.severity, detail: f.detail, evidence: f.evidence, cwv: (f.issue_class === "perf" ? $json.__cwv : null), status: "open", run_date: $json.__run_date }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Notify Report
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
